stemHtml: In cruising flight, with the centre of gravity forward of main wing centre of pressure, the force on the horizontal tailplane is directed:

options.a: Upward in order to balance the aerodynamic moment about the centre of gravity.
options.b: Upward and is equal to weight.
options.c: Downward which reduces the induced drag.
options.d: Downward in order to balance the aerodynamic moment about the centre of gravity.
